src: A young silver-coated dog with smooth fur, floppy ears, and bright eyes. Its lean, muscular body gives an athletic appearance. The dog wears a simple collar, and its short, polished coat is finely detailed.
edit: A mythical creature resembling a skeletal canine with translucent fur, glowing crimson eyes, elongated bony ears, and a shadowy collar, evoking an eerie, otherworldly presence.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is upright, head up, next to a letter board with weight and age. It's in front of a large window showing a snowy landscape with bare trees, contrasting the pale wooden floor inside.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object stands on a rock ledge, sideways to the camera, with a black and teal harness and leash, overlooking green hills and a cloudy sky, suggesting an elevated, mountainous area.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: the object in an energetic stance closeup, ears flapping outward, viewed from a low angle, with a green grassy field in the background and pebbled areas.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: the object stands on green grass with its tongue out, surrounded by patchy brown-spotted grass in a spacious, open area with blurred distant vegetation.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: the object is sitting sideways to the camera with hind legs on a couch, surrounded by geometric-patterned cushions, in a living room with neutral walls and visible hardwood flooring.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object sits on a large tree stump in a foggy grassy area. Distant trees and paths are barely visible, suggesting a natural setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is lying sideways to the camera beside a letter board with age and weight, near a large window showing snowy trees. The white floor panels enhance the bright, minimalist interior.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object sits on a couch with a colorful patterned cushion, sideways to the camera. Shutters on the windows cast striped shadows, with a plush throw draped over the furniture.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is upright, head lifted, beside a letter board showing weight and age. Set in front of a large window with an autumn landscape. Golden leaves scattered on the dark wooden floor inside.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object stands on a large rock ledge, sideways to the camera, in a black and teal harness and leash, surrounded by rolling hills in amber, russet, and gold, with a gray sky above and falling leaves.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is in an energetic stance close to the camera, with ears flapping outward, captured from a low angle. Surrounded by orange and golden leaves replacing the grassy field, with pebbled areas and scattered autumn leaves in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object stands on golden grass with its tongue out, surrounded by amber and russet grass. Distant foliage is painted in vibrant reds and oranges, creating a spacious autumn scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object sits sideways on an earthy-toned couch, surrounded by leaf-adorned cushions. The setting has golden tones, with polished hardwood flooring and radiant autumn sunlight streaming in.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is sitting on a large tree stump, gazing right, in a foggy grassy area with autumnal colors. Distant trees in orange, red, and yellow are visible through the mist, with lightly discernible paths winding through.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object lies sideways to the camera beside a letter board with age and weight. A window shows trees with orange, red, yellow leaves. Wooden floor panels complete the autumn setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: An object is seated sideways on a couch with a vibrant autumn cushion. Shutters cast striped shadows. A deep orange throw is draped over the furniture, indoors in a cozy autumn setting.
